pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; older versions are incompatible with the new JDK and Spring ecosystem.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot plugin version to 3.3.13 to match the core Spring Boot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The plugin version must match the core framework version to ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x features and build processes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guice dependency from 3.0 to 5.1.0 for compatibility with modern Java and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Guice versions may have compatibility issues with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x classloading or reflection mechanisms.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Arquillian JUnit 4 container with JUnit 5 container to support modern testing standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: Arquillian JUnit 4 integration is deprecated or incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x test infrastructure which relies on JUnit 5.

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude JUnit 4 from fabric8-arquillian to prevent conflicts with JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Transitive JUnit 4 dependencies from fabric8-arquillian can cause classpath conflicts or test runner issues in a JUnit 5 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Compiler Plugin to use 'release' flag for Java 17 instead of separate source/target.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for Java 9+; using them with Java 17 can lead to warnings or incorrect bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin version to 3.15.1-SNAPSHOT to support Java 17 compilation features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not fully support Java 17 language features or the 'release' flag correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin version to 3.1.3-SNAPSHOT for compatibility with Java 17 and JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may not correctly execute tests on Java 17 or support JUnit 5 platform features required by Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/no/rutebanken/extime/tests.general_idea: Migrate Arquillian test runner from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
src/test/java/no/rutebanken/extime/tests.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner (@RunWith) is not recognized by JUnit 5 platform; tests will be ignored or fail to execute without the JUnit 5 extension.

src/test/java/no/rutebanken/extime/tests.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 test annotation with JUnit 5 equivalent.
src/test/java/no/rutebanken/extime/tests.why_exists: org.junit.Test is not available in JUnit 5; compilation fails if JUnit 4 dependency is removed or if strict JUnit 5 imports are enforced.

src/test/java/no/rutebanken/extime/tests.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner import with JUnit 5 extension import.
src/test/java/no/rutebanken/extime/tests.why_exists: org.junit.runner.RunWith is not available in JUnit 5; compilation fails if JUnit 4 dependency is removed.

src/test/java/no/rutebanken/extime/tests.general_idea: Update Arquillian integration import from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
src/test/java/no/rutebanken/extime/tests.why_exists: org.jboss.arquillian.junit.Arquillian is specific to JUnit 4; using it with JUnit 5 setup causes runtime or configuration errors.
